arts.ttl: Elon Musk would be open to buying Liverpool, claims father
arts.sum: Fenway Sports Group has previously looked for external investment since acquiring the Reds in 2010

arts.ttl: “I asked for advice” – Player contacted Liverpool’s Arne Slot to discuss Nottingham Forest offer
arts.sum: On Monday, Feyenoord’s Santiago Giménez hinted about a move to Liverpool, after having snubbed Nottingham Forest last summer. The striker stated he would be happy to reunite with Arne Slot, who left the Dutch club for Liverpool at the end of last season. arts.ttl: Aston Villa and Tottenham enquire about PSG centre-back Milan Škriniar
arts.sum: Aston Villa and Tottenham Hotspur have enquired about the loan signing of PSG centre-back Milan Škriniar (29), according to a report this Wednesday from L’Equipe. The outlet understands that Škriniar’s…

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister admits he taunted Man Utd star over goal in Liverpool's draw
arts.athr: liverpool.news@trinitymirror.com (Harry Brent, Kasra Moradi, Maria Ortega)
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister took a moment out from the intense 2-2 draw with Manchester United to aim some light-hearted teasing at international team-mate Lisandro Martinez

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid is inevitable: Insulting January bid the first sign that Florentino Perez is locked in on Liverpool star
arts.sum: When Trent Alexander-Arnold pinged the ball into the back of the net - via a handsome deflection - during Liverpool's 5-0 win over West Ham on December 30, he ran to the corner flag in celebration, throwing up a gesture that seemed to suggest that he was aware of the talk surrounding a transfer to Real Madrid . Seven days on from his West Ham goal, and less than a week after it emerged that Madrid had bid around £20 million ($25m) to secure his services this January, Alexander-Arnold's subpar showing rendered any previous celebrations irrelevant.

arts.ttl: Big Donley verdict, Scarlett battle, £12.4m transfer chance in Spurs loan latest
arts.sum: Alfie Devine and Luka Vuskovic are the other Tottenham loan players to have had a break over Christmas and New Year having last played on Boxing Day in Westerlo's 4-3 defeat at Club Brugge. Saturday proved to be a frustrating day for Manor Solomon and Leeds United as they drew 3-3 away at Hull City after surrendering a 3-1 second-half lead.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou drops major Tottenham transfer hint amid Randal Kolo Muani links
arts.sum: I thought he felt, ‘ok the start of my career wasn’t great but I’ve worked my way back to a big club and now I want to show people I can play at this level and I can make an impact'," said Postecoglou. Postecoglou was asked on Friday about links to 26-year-old versatile France international Muani but would only say that the club is working hard to bring in new players to help the current overplayed squad.

arts.ttl: The ‘special’ sign Liverpool can go far in unthinkable quest for quadruple
arts.sum: The Reds face Spurs in the Carabao Cup semi-finals in the latest stop en route to a potential, yet unlikely, quadruple under Arne Slot
